utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each item has a value specified, though most refer to the same bundled plan. The instruction requires that each item be fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details (e.g., for health_coverage: physical and mental health insurance with costs, etc.). In the final plan, health_coverage, property_coverage, and travel_coverage are not detailed beyond the plan name; they do not include the required details about coverage scope or costs. The additional_services item is more detailed, listing contents of the bundle, and total_budget includes a cost figure. Thus, only additional_services and total_budget are fully specified with the necessary details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists 'LifeFirst Standard Plan07 (bundled)' for health, property, and travel coverage, as well as additional services. The suffix '07' appears to be a version identifier but corresponds directly to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' or 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' in the ground-truth ratings. For each coverage type: health coverage uses 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 8 under primary_health_coverage → physical_health), property coverage uses 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 8 under property_protection → home_content), and travel coverage uses 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 7 under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance). The additional services are bundled and described as including telemedicine, wellness, global assistance, etc., all of which are part of the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' package structure, so they map to the same base plan rating of 8 as the health plan. Therefore, all four entries correspond to the same LifeFirst Standard tier ratings depending on the category.

final_package_text:
{

    "additional_services": "LifeFirst Standard Plan07 (bundled, includes dedicated agent, priority claims, 24/7 customer support, global assistance, emergency coordination, multilingual support, wellness programs, telemedicine)",
    "total_budget": "€545.0/month"
